strengths: 15+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Active AI/agentic tooling work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Demonstrated entrepreneurial instinct: founded GISCollective open-source platform and has a track record of public speaking and knowledge sharing
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of recognized AI expertise, publications, or large-scale AI product ownership
AI strategy experience is shallow — only ~14 months at a staff engineer level, with no history of advising strategic customers or shaping platform-level AI direction
Career arc is individual-contributor product engineering with no signal of director-level scope, executive stakeholder management, or cloud platform strategy
response.justification: The candidate brings broad, genuine software craftsmanship and a credible 15+ year track record, but the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership — advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud-AI platform vision, and commanding recognized AI expertise. The candidate's AI work is recent (~14 months) and execution-focused rather than strategic. There is no evidence of C-suite or partner advisory experience, no advanced AI credentials, and the most senior title reached is Staff Software Engineer. The gap between the candidate's current profile and the seniority and domain depth this role requires is too large to bridge with a single promotion.
